comment: This is generated by ESQL's DocsV3Support. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.
name: column_metadata
description: When enabled, each column in the `_query` response may carry a `_meta` object with namespaced per-column metadata (for example, `bucket` interval for `BUCKET` groupings). Defaults to `false`; must be explicitly opted in.
